hero.name: Juan Sebastian Torra Garcia
hero.subtitle: FullStack Developer focused on building modern, fast, and scalable web experiences.

about.title: Building modern web experiences
about.description: Passionate about creating practical and efficient solutions, with a strong focus on innovation and continuous improvement. I have experience in the analysis, design, and development of applications, and I stand out for my ability to collaborate in teams, solve complex problems, and quickly adapt to new technologies. My goal is to contribute to a company's growth by applying technical skills and continuous learning, ensuring quality and efficiency in every project.
about.misionDescription: Develop modern, intuitive, and efficient web solutions that deliver high-quality digital experiences.
about.visionDescription: Become a FullStack developer capable of building innovative digital products with real impact.

project1.title: Financial Tracker
project1.description: Web application developed to manage personal income and expenses, allowing users to calculate financial balances and clearly visualize their financial status in an organized way.

project2.title: Portfolio Generator
project2.description: Web application that allows users to create dynamic portfolios and resumes by registering personal information, skills, and experience, with CRUD functionalities and real-time preview.

project3.title: Library System
project3.description: Library management system designed to manage books, categories, publishers, users, and loans, optimizing the control and organization of resources.

project4.title: PokeAPI Website
project4.description: Interactive web application that consumes the PokeAPI API to display Pokémon, filter by types, and view detailed information about each character through a modern and responsive interface.

project5.title: Ready Player One Website
project5.description: Informative website inspired by the movie Ready Player One, focused on presenting content related to the cast, synopsis, and curiosities through an attractive visual design.
